[{"Name":"chen levy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0QgD_gqTlXwKtBpxuK407GKy3lqZEDZXO6CULgXQaOd1WKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A cool VIP cinema with a warm and cozy viewing experience — it truly feels like watching a movie at home 🎬
Super comfortable armchairs, a relaxed atmosphere, and kind, attentive waiters who make the experience even better.
Perfect for a fun, pampering movie night. Highly recommended! 🍿✨","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCgzNsTG7JnNA_GWKyO6qK0&fid=0x0:0x86ef21c474b2f305"],"When":"2026-1-8"},{"Name":"Rainer Sebus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJi6TkIePwKambaOwGyHkYGDn6wdDxMz8LVd33IqYGg9ivfqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great cinema y exceptional experience

We like this cinema, comfortable seats, luxury menue and in cinema service.

But today I’ve made a very special experience:
I forgot my wallet during the last movie. Not only they found it, they shared they phone number and whatsapp and informed me!
But not only they did all possible to hep me - the content of my wallet was complete and nothing was missing!

Thank you to the whole team for saving me and for being so incredible reliable, honest and friendly! You are an example!

Best experience ever!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Noble-Beeck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFNyIuz4uLoClMLsJ2-CMtxYIiGSeiXqzAiwnE8hhQroQ2w18IOA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"This was my inaugural experience viewing "Avatar 3" in a Spanish-subtitled theatrical presentation and first time at the lux super theatre. The cinema's entrance presented a remarkably clean, aesthetically pleasing, and sophisticated ambiance. However, upon entering the theater, I noted the restroom facilities were singularly located at the rear of the premises, necessitating a considerable walk from the main viewing areas.

I appreciated the convenience of in-seat food ordering. Regrettably, the burger I ordered, despite requesting it medium-rare, arrived significantly undercooked. Furthermore, although I had arranged to receive my crepe after my meal and subsequently utilized the service button to request it, it was not delivered until near the conclusion of the film.

A significant discomfort throughout the screening was the excessively warm temperature within the theater. It felt akin to a sauna, suggesting either a lack of air conditioning or its operation in a heating capacity. This, combined with the faux leather seating, resulted in considerable discomfort for patrons. I strongly recommend activating the air conditioning and potentially offering blankets to those who may find the temperature too cool, as the room was uncomfortably hot by the end of the 3.5-hour film, including advertisements.

The staff, however, were consistently kind and polite, which is the sole reason for the two-star rating. Aside from the commendable service, the menu and food quality were unsatisfactory.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Howard W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwehXjkfqD3sZjAAgJUj7akN1KRtboTR08co9cNaRjeu3AlaU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The cinema is great. The chairs are super comfortable - but really not worth ordering food. Snacks like pop-corn and drinks they deliver fine. But having visited quite a few times, I have learned that hot food either arrives cold, incomplete, or not at all. Just save your money and enjoy the reclining seat and marvellous view.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jessie Kuo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV029-cvNrenk_yGJ___J8pMQxTr6zK6Y8Zk7KyvoUDT8K9uJsP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved my experience here—so worth the extra money for an upgraded movie night! Saw Babygirl with friends, and the seats were incredibly comfortable. Loved being able to order wine and dinner right to my seat.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCA8vbkBg&fid=0x0:0x86ef21c474b2f305"],"When":"2025-1-30"},{"Name":"Maria Jose O.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYQJftCiwY2uEburAfPYoZDySTB2YdOv_WQl0c7NRhZvhF5A0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Really nice movie theater. The experience was better than expected. Very friendly staff, comfortable seatings and great service. I was watching a movie alone and it was a great experience. Recommended they help me choice everything to discover the brand","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDOD6UWRXPX6wiGhg47-Gm5&fid=0x0:0xef973a21c0953dc7"],"When":"2026-1-11"},{"Name":"Priscilla Monge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnXnO_5WWICYkcSEniWGWTDQ7PGuOD3aV0AGveJVhfYsZAtYjDbw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Realicé el curso de colorimetría y el servicio fue excelente de principio a fin. Desde el primer momento me sentí muy bien atendida. Jesús me brindó una atención increíble: es una persona muy amable, profesional y dedicada. Durante todo el proceso me hicieron sentir hermosa, cuidada y segura. Sin duda repetiría el servicio con Jesús y ahora soy una nueva clienta de Saigu ✨💕","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_I0BPW32Go8tYbUEyZT54&fid=0x0:0xef973a21c0953dc7"],"When":"2026-1-13"},{"Name":"Paqui","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKTcGxcz0ueuI6pHYek1S-0DH9cInBqGvpx2t7vIRZ9avoCb5w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Recomiendo 100% Estos productos, son un antes y un después.
Estuve en la tienda de Fuencarral, ofrece una experiencia  impecable.
La atención al cliente fue de sobresaliente en este caso la de Jesús, el chico que me atendió, consigue que encuentres justo lo que necesitas .
Además fue encantador.
Sin duda un lugar al que siempre apetece volver.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDodkYoQBVLAdPnHSfTWwAF&fid=0x0:0xef973a21c0953dc7"],"When":"2025-11-27"},{"Name":"Gemma Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuBVWZjz6HZtIxWRcoYxyIM1ubYhdL-LEFn_PBNy7Ilt9e9ZTn=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hice el pack de colorimetría y automaquillaje y no podría estar más contenta con los resultados! La que me atendió fue Elvira y fue magnífica. Escuchó todas mis dudas y se adaptó a mis necesidades. Dejo debajo mi resultado final: maquillada divina y contenta con todos los productos de saigu que me llevaba. Muchas gracias por todo!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDN49gkvbyy-wmfi2S819Do&fid=0x0:0xef973a21c0953dc7"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"Mily Quintero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJUeXvsv2zBpo-19v5PSgKZqpvMX1uemOEN7KlowX5c_PzpDv-6=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Conocí Saigu cuando estaba buscando una marca libre de químicos, natural y me encanta.
Soy clienta conozco la marca y entré para comprar, yo misma me vendí y se la vendí a mi amiga, te dejan mirar y enterarte por ti mismo te dicen que si necesitas ayuda se lo comentes, cuando creo que deberían preguntarte si conoces el producto y su valor diferenciador.
Ningún vendedor se acercó a ayudarme o explicarme las promos de los packs hasta que yo pedí la ayuda. A pesar que fueron simpáticos, necesitan vender mejor el producto y mejorar la atención.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCB1icshyjUa25k0-ilToKv&fid=0x0:0xef973a21c0953dc7"],"When":"2025-10-26"},{"Name":"Mercedes del Alamo Camuñas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjpCwB2CzIhmVoVmgzVtgZZ77Phs5-ZwMSaLGhhb5_hOoNcUXd3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Los productos son bueno y por eso precisamente he comprado online varias veces. En mi último pedido hubo un problema con la empresa de transporte y cuando reclamo porque el pedido no llega (pasada ya más de una semana) me indican que lo van a revisar. La realidad fue que llega el pedido a las tres semanas sin que desde atención al cliente se muevan nada más que por mis reclamaciones. Por supuesto ni una mínima compensación por las molestias. Sinceramente, creo que con el precio por el que vendéis los productos os merece la pena invertir más en una buena atención al cliente","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Noelia Paredes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQceFs_BRzDGyfph7WIyo1tK2ZbNvHuvTvzkfxjeWyySlyWw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Recomendable 100%.
Fui con una amiga para servicio de colorimetría y automaquillaje.
Nos atendió Jesús, nos explicó detalladamente a qué estación de color pertenecemos cada una y los colores y tonos que más nos favorecen. Fue muy amable, atento y profesional. Practicamos el automaquillaje paso a paso de todo el rostro con todas sus indicaciones y aprendimos mucho, además de ayudarnos a elegir los mejores productos para nosotras.
Nos encantó la experiencia!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Montse Gomez Bezanilla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJN95pz2j5224UiRL5C7Uz20SNPINWJAZHSGVGojHze83EPdw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mi hija me regaló el curso de colorimetría y auto-maquillaje para hacerlo juntas, y hemos salido encantadas, tanto por todo lo que hemos aprendido como por la atención de Ana y de sus compañeros, que han sido encantadores. Y los productos, de los que soy seguidora desde hace tiempo, son estupendos. Un experiencia muy recomendable.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"simony do calipso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIUDZMzFfHJHi0hDh2FpJOLpupVwZcoqurhevCwarcrrSmvUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Food was really tasty and place clean and well decorated. Service fast! The only downside was the size of portions. My husband and I ordered 2 main dishes ( one was the most expensive meat dish and the other the duck with fruits) and the portions were very, very small. Like, the side of the fillet mignon was literally 4 asparagus. So 200g of meat ( even if delicious) with nothing on the side was a little disappointing:/","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDu94g6O8OyNrewPWBqkcb5&fid=0x0:0xfea82352b1afce6c"],"When":"2025-10-3"},{"Name":"James Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjyJt_ph53MikcOUJuNfZ0a-ZD4cTxEhxhTKamPlz4w7P3bE-2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"5/5 Stars – Highly Recommended!

This is a beautifully designed, modern family-run restaurant. The menu is diverse and absolutely delicious. As someone of Asian background with high standards, I have to say everything was prepared with authenticity and heart. It was a fantastic experience.

The atmosphere was cozy and stylish, the service extremely friendly, and the food was simply outstanding. From the appetizers all the way to the mochi dessert, everything was spot on. You can truly taste the high quality of the ingredients – only the best was used, which clearly sets this place apart from many other sushi restaurants.

We had a wonderful dinner, and the pricing was more than fair.
The carabineros shrimps, truffle duck dumplings, and especially the No. 37 Foel Flameado Nigiri are must-eats!

Highly recommended – we’ll definitely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCEialjNZXtyG3KLhioJeHe&fid=0x0:0xfea82352b1afce6c"],"When":"2025-7-3"},{"Name":"Adriana Prieto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJUgUVllggCFB_d6xAa8_bN0NNdGCncbO-Zpc713CztA1KzJw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I have mixed feelings about this. The sushi and the tallarines with shrimp were A+. The duck dumplings  with truffle and egg rolls were good but i guess i was expecting more flavor, it was both more like beef taste. The restaurant was great and service was excellent and good priced.
We wanted to try a few dishes so we did not have a a bug main dish.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDRiPvh2gE&fid=0x0:0xfea82352b1afce6c"],"When":"2023-4-16"},{"Name":"Linton Nightingale","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_a6sUULyCFYsWbf55N4tIEeaBZ5hP__FQhICChAXhrFCXUSI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I loved this place from the word go! Friendly staff will meet and greet you at the door. The decor is simple yet chic. You'll be overwhelmed by the huge variety of food options available on their menu, and if you can't find it on the menu, ask to chef to make it for you. The food was scrumptious and won't disappoint you. Prices work out at an average of around €30pp depending on how much you drink. A bonus is that you can book on The Fork and make use of discounts up to 40% on menu prices, or use your Yums to get discounts. I recommend ordering anything that comes with the word luxury (their signature word on featured dishes)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDW2NuoqQE&fid=0x0:0xfea82352b1afce6c"],"When":"2022-3-14"},{"Name":"Julia Murphy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKiSY6rkNv1anr_wW4kajE33T6alNOEIps4Sd0V5mhcmjgrsg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good food! The sushi was amazing and the next we go we will definitely order more.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4n7nDeQ&fid=0x0:0xfea82352b1afce6c"],"When":"2018-11-17"},{"Name":"Jesus Ramos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjtRe5JDmZRfmowVhktSUCQ9QI6e4pG3Vs0icedPS0tplYGAg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this place. It was my first time. I came here tonight, because my girlfriend wanted to  I was blown away. First of all, my server was incredible. I can’t remember his name, but he was the best sever I’ve ever had. He was respectful, knowledgeable of the food he was serving, and just generally a pleasant person to speak to.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luis Bonet","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKV6Sq-gSp_kNHlC9uv5p8FnGp5TozKHQleOwzS6uKeiAlMVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Came here during the pandemic and booked through an online platform to get a solid discount on menu items. the waiters are great.
the price is unbeatable.
overall best experience with this restaurant!

highly recommend this place!!","Images":null,"When":""}]

The €12 price was very fair, and the WiFi is reliable too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCw8oC1Nw&fid=0x0:0xd6da5d7c7ac05ab5"],"When":"2025-3-17"},{"Name":"Sil Chan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9bFG3Pn36wPCon_ZB58u-RgcQfTlxI7eI1jpLXKaLw-w66COn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this place so much. I tried the Passiflora (mango, strawberry, passion fruit, cucumber, mint, orange juice 🥭🍓🥒🍊). The brunch menu looks amazing and I look forward to coming back to try it all! 🥗🥑🥪🍳🍽️

Point of improvement: Would be better to see the personnel a bit more considerate with their phone activities and volume, watching videos next to customers eating. There are AirPods for this. 📲🎧","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICbk52WoQE&fid=0x0:0xd6da5d7c7ac05ab5"],"When":"2024-7-29"},{"Name":"Alanah Gargan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLPuldFCTPB7Cw5tP9_6gny8akXoaG2EeulJP3ofyugzhvvTg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great healthy restaurant with extremely good prices for their menú. Everything was so good and filling. We went at lunchtime on a Saturday and got the menú for 14.90 and 15.90. I got the chicken run, an unlimited refill lemonade and a chocolate mousse for 14.90. We also got the slowly toscana which was very good. I'd really recommend the cookies. The staff were so nice and helpful and the atmosphere was very relaxed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICh6OXaDQ&fid=0x0:0xd6da5d7c7ac05ab5"],"When":"2023-2-4"},{"Name":"Aline Noizet","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiQ3FaLv6hk1dD8-mcFPsIoGYXAXZZXePfZshf6D31fpkXrrzU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice gem in the city. Very healthy food with a nice range of options. We went on a Saturday and they had brunch and lunch menus so plenty of options. I had chicken bun bun on brioche. Very tasty!! The dish was actually quite huge accompanied by spinach leaves and potatoes. They also have toasts, huevos rancheros and a variety of health salads and healthy dessert. Great quality/price as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDVmNrHHg&fid=0x0:0xd6da5d7c7ac05ab5"],"When":"2023-12-10"}]

[{"Name":"Anna Gałka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIj8L9rnzVMseBZhHA84JjPVaQ5zPB99ti6bd_to-Vrc5yZ9w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful experience shopping at this jewelry store. I purchased a bracelet and a pair of earrings, and I am absolutely in love with them. The quality is excellent and the designs are beautiful and elegant. The staff was very helpful and kind, making the whole shopping experience pleasant and stress-free. I will definitely come back and highly recommend this store to anyone looking for special jewelry.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin Morales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-AYqy-nPKvm3JkF92aDocECM98XSGyo1y_d1tzFR7jYjoWg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"One of the worst retail experiences I’ve ever had.

Fresh off my graduation from ICADE, I walked into this shop ready to celebrate a milestone with a watch. Instead, I was met by an attendant whose smug, condescending expression stayed plastered on his face the entire time.

I asked to see an AP Royal Oak — he immediately claimed they didn’t have one. When I pointed out the watch sitting right there in the display, he reluctantly brought it over without a word, didn’t set it down, didn’t offer a closer look — nothing. When I asked to try it on, he acted like I had just asked him for a kidney.

This wasn’t just bad service — it was open contempt for the customer.

Other reviewers were spot-on: arrogant, rude, dismissive, and completely undeserving of the brands they represent.

I wouldn’t recommend this shop to my worst enemy. If you value respect, professionalism, or basic human decency, do yourself a favor and buy elsewhere. Anywhere else - trust me, you'll be happy you did.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Solal MHN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIlQS076Fa2kcOr1REmXK3XgBAR67XvWjfJZXOb2Swhhxj8mw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very nice packaging, super fast delivery in 48 hours. The watch looks great, as on the pictures. The seller is very professional and answers any questions on whatsapp.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex Boiardi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJwGjynYKnOVYUKW_1kN-tfVmgFr1j2pR0cAmulXfsHl7lhuA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If I was able to give a zero star review I would. I’m not sure if it’s because I’m young or because I wasn’t born in Spain (despite being fully fluent), but I’ve never encountered worse customer service in my life.

I’ve worked incredibly hard to save up and purchase a Rolex sports watch. Let’s start with the first attendant (I can’t remember the name but a Latin American man), I was inquiring about a Rolex batgirl (with jubilee bracelet) which the links came very short. I’m average height and have an average build, and the watch fit incredibly tight. I asked if it came with extra links and the guy said “I don’t know, this is how it came”, I asked him “how many should this watch be coming with?” - he looked upwards thinking hard to then say “I think 11” to which I said “Listen, I’m trying to buy a Rolex TODAY, please provide as much info as possible, this is a €17k watch we’re talking about”. He said he had to look it up and left, he then came back with another colleague and said “my colleague will look after you”, this time a Spanish man with glasses (the manager). I was trying to ascertain how many links the watch was missing, I even said “Okay please adjust the position of the clasp to maximise the length of the bracelet so I can see if it at least fits me”. He said to me “okay I’ll adjust it if you agree to buy the watch beforehand”, I actually 100% thought he was joking and laughed. He then asked me, “how are you going to pay?”, to which I then said “Oh you’re not joking?” To which he said “No” because he might scratch it in the process!! Apart from the extreme rudeness, I was seriously told to buy a €17k watch before even knowing whether the watch would fit me!!!

This is the most unprofessional place ever, the saddest part is that my friend and I were planning to get two watches! After that treatment, they can forget getting any business from my friends or I - I genuinely wish the best luck that that business can actually survive - Rolex AD’s treat me like a king in comparison!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alexander Messerer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKD0OBRVvRKwt4FBopX-qEdwvGgCLMLUY22Tf96T5REoAYmyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"As you can read in most of the reviews, I can only confirm that the manager is incredibly arrogant, rude and unfriendly towards his customers. I wanted to get an appraisal for my watch and not only were they trying to scam me, they also started bullying and talking down at me when my preferred price was above theirs - although I came in asking for what they would think was the right price. Another customer, who noticed how I was treated by the shop owner, was reluctant to buy anything there afterwards, complained and left the shop with me. Rightly so! You shouldn't buy from people like that. Disgraceful to treat your customers like that. No matter whether you want to sell or buy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Antonella paolucci","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK6H6kINJhx2lMDHGUxW4w2RWtzEG2IOghHx0pY2YgDkcctiw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We bought a beautiful vintage Cartier and everybody was so nice and professional.We will definitely be in touch for future purchases.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUt1SkLE0SLM7OQtdJ25rYEw44X-nYtAmIVdCPRcZykmG62E14m=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Come here only if you want to be treated terribly! Deserves zero stars. Read other one star reviews to understand the bad experience that awaits you here.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mario Velloso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXad8GRgZfkdDXAL3j4beUTynandidl6i7EYoB6bikNwYelL28h=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you for your attention, wonderful watch!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Umi San","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUtFw6dabbkBZ97oBdlDeIGhfIWmndWNJEfSmo6zFKE9QxcuFDT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"por conducta inapropiada de dos personas vinculadas a la agencia Nuba

Estimados señores de Nuba,

Me dirijo a ustedes para expresar mi profunda preocupación y malestar por el comportamiento inapropiado de dos personas vinculadas a su agencia, concretamente un directivo y su pareja, quienes han actuado de forma perjudicial hacia mi negocio.

En concreto, bajo los seudónimos “Lucy Belial” y “Josh Hedaya”, han publicado reseñas falsas y difamatorias sobre el servicio y la cocina de mi local. Dichas opiniones carecen por completo de fundamento, ya que su única visita se limitó a consumir dos cervezas y un café en la terraza, permaneciendo aproximadamente una hora, sin haber probado en ningún momento la comida ni el servicio de mesa del establecimiento.

Considero inaceptable que personas vinculadas a una agencia de viajes de reconocido prestigio recurran a este tipo de prácticas, que no solo dañan la reputación de un negocio local, sino que también comprometen la imagen de profesionalidad que debería caracterizar a Nuba.

Solicito que se investigue esta situación y se tomen las medidas oportunas para evitar que este tipo de comportamientos se repitan, así como que se retiren o rectifiquen las reseñas falsas publicadas bajo los mencionados nombres.

Quedo a su disposición para facilitar las pruebas necesarias (capturas de pantalla y datos de la visita) que acreditan lo expuesto.

Atentamente,
Mar","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDv2NfV5iekBtRcvGMSX5Sa&fid=0x0:0xf3cc36c2be1ac1dd"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Nicolai Bustinza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6R7OhEagLG0aJ_4cRrPGwAEC2iMdu9RuP9l8pj_743_PQbEnwgw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Compré los pasajes para mis vacaciones en NUBA, Madrid, y la experiencia fue muy buena. El personal me atendió con amabilidad y me ayudó a elegir las mejores opciones según mis fechas y destino. Todo el proceso fue rápido y claro, sin complicaciones. Es un buen lugar en Madrid para gestionar viajes y reservas con confianza y comodidad.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAUyGp58FnpSZmJJVM6MNlY&fid=0x0:0xf3cc36c2be1ac1dd"],"When":"2025-9-12"},{"Name":"Wafa Assou","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWF6WqlizkftHlUXToaPECmMHugX6Qnqc8GE8Q4kwcXQERk9GHy=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El viaje organizado por Nuba a la costa azul ha sido maravilloso si tuviésemos que destacar alguna cosa significativa diríamos que es la dedicación entrega apoyo incondicional de Veronica Peñalver, una mujer única y con una alta profesionalidad. Felicidades Nuba por tener gente como ella. Un abrazo😘❤️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura García Perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKpmLTfwuaEoY2OldYD0ZgmLBuYtRP-NFO1ygroT7sF15d9ww=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nuestro viaje a Fez con Nuba fue genial. Desde que llegamos todo fue de lujo y súper emocionante. Los riads eran impresionantes y las actividades privadas , como los talleres de artesanía, fueron muy divertidas. La atención fue de primera y nos sentimos muy bien cuidadas. ¡Definitivamente volveremos a viajar con Nuba! Gracias Andrea y Verónica por los tips!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICr_9TTiAE&fid=0x0:0xf3cc36c2be1ac1dd"],"When":"2024-7-12"},{"Name":"Begona peris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK_NjVskOzi8zoNagKFlvWfOQua-hxOCwMzQH_K9E7SBiTNww=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nuba y Alicia Minguez nos organizaron un viaje a nuestra medida a la Grecia Continental , Atenas, Las Termopilas, Meteora y Delfos, un viaje atemporal, maravilloso, con fantásticos hoteles , choferes atentos y amabilísimos , guías muy profesionales y preparadas que permitieron que disfrutáramos muchísimo de toda la belleza y la historia que nos rodeaba.
El viaje resultó espectacular, y a pesar de conocer tanto de Grecia desde el colegio, resultó sorprendente.
Este viaje nos ha dejado con ganas de seguir conociendo Grecia hemos vuelto  entusiasmados y seguramente sin Nuba no hubiera sido lo mismo, ellos han hecho de un viaje sin duda estupendo, una experiencia inigualable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICzod2TJQ&fid=0x0:0xf3cc36c2be1ac1dd"],"When":"2024-6-2"},{"Name":"Victoria Pérez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVWvN5Dj_EsjZL0uI3HRVCk0Gi-zOU96Igmzn6vHqH9lWzeW0iX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Fuimos a reservar un Safari por Tanzania, en un primer momento la comercial fuer muy maja y atenta.
Nos comentó que para hacer el presupuesto debíamos de abonar 200€ que nos descontaría del viaje.
Paganos los 200€, tardaron en darnos el presupuesto 3 semanas, tras varias llamadas y mails (esto me pareció raro)
A partir de ahí, nunca más se supo
Jamás llamó para ver los detalles
Jamás nos preguntó que nos parecía …
En fin, la sensación fue de pérdida de tiempo y dinero.
Una pena, estábamos muy ilusionados.
Lo contratamos con otra agencia (voiash) y SÚPER BIEN - recomendable 100%

Tras escribir esta reseña se pusieron en contacto con nosotros disculpándose, nos comentaron que estaban en plenas navidades … y nos devolvieron los 200€, lo agradecemos aunque nos hubiera gustado hacer el viaje con ellos.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gorka S.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiMofXE2r8T9eMmxDkKkEW4z_CLVxqywNh0zAln7ayoQVOHCqRrw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hemos viajado con ellos a Finlandia y la experiencia ha sido inmejorable…. Impecable atención al cliente… Alicia no puede ser más atenta y estar pendiente de todo. Sin duda repetiremos con ellos.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDVk83_7wE&fid=0x0:0xf3cc36c2be1ac1dd"],"When":"2023-12-15"},{"Name":"Nuria Bonet","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJtUXqlZP6PmpOs0RMLi5Pqc-MF0zVFjMsLEpr2n18yRLgZlg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hicimos un viaje en familia con mis nietos  de 5 y 8 años a Costa Rica, y repetiríamos cada año. No teniamos muy claro lo que queriamos hacer pero enseguida vieron nuestra forma de vida y dieron con la clave.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura F g","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURXMfQj4aA4BwkljBAP107i1ztO38bHdu799T6-U6wIiWkEuSC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Somos un matrimonio joven que se puso en sus manos ya que teníamos muchas ideas en la cabeza y gracias a su paciencia, mucha, supieron dar con el estilo que deseábamos. No era fácil iluminar un piso antiguo de Madrid y ahora parece que todos los días son soleados.

Ahora nos toca la casa de Asturias, preparados puesto que es una casa del s XIX...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICcx7WEtAE&fid=0x0:0xae5862fac6ff4e1e"],"When":"2020-4-20"},{"Name":"Alfonso Cornejo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKb61RqqBJg5mX4uW5DBgAoVIycppIeloxXe2J06AtibEE1ER8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hace ya un par de meses que estamos viviendo en nuestra "nueva" casa. Bueno, nueva no, reformada casa 😊

Quiero agradecer a todo el equipo de Luitom Interiorismo y especialmente a Silvia, Luis y Tomás todo el esfuerzo y cariño invertido en nuestra obra. Gracias a ellos tenemos esta maravillosa casa: desde el primer momento se han involucrado muchísimo y hasta en el final de la obra y con los últimos repasos de la misma habéis estado siempre cercanos, y especialmente Silvia, atenta a que cada detalle se lograra terminar.

Ahora os vamos a echar de menos, pero esperamos veros pronto. Desearos un gran nuevo año con muchos proyectos y nuevas alegrías. Y aprovecho para recomendar vuestro gran trabajo desde aquí.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"McP","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSMA4jyDMeR6sDuaDUJ7d4mfz9DeadxCcZCFdoOZII5AsMBHlP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Confiamos en ellos para la reforma de nuestra casa y fue una apuesta segura, los recomendamos al 100%

Ahora que disfrutamos de ella más que nunca dada la situación existente estamos encantados de tener nuestro salón y cocina unidos, además de no haber cerrado la terraza, gracias a su recomendación.

Agradecer al equipo de obras y en especial a Silvia todo el trabajo y tiempo dedicados, gracias por todo!!

Volveremos a contar con vosotros en un futuro! Un abrazo a todo el equipo!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juan Altamirano Osado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL50cUKPNqYlznZ-6YUOzZqH1N3JFaoB4XsGYy6q9QS3JY_wQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Gracias a las ideas que estos jóvenes arquitectos nos mostraron,  hemos cambiado nuestra forma de ver un bajo,  antes pensábamos que no íbamos a tener luz natural,  pero ahora estamos pensando hasta en instalar un toldo.
Fuimos muy desconfiados con el inmueble que nos había tocado en herencia, pero tras tomar con ellos un almuerzo, tranquilizarnos, nos mostraron la luz (nunca mejor dicho).
Recomendado para esas reformas que uno cree imposibles que le van a sacar una sonrisa.
PD: la casa es en pleno Madrid y no escuchamos ruido alguno.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBrX8uVUG0JfiObdh1Luix9ZAzKZnISALP6CXobcSrYLSQtsc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I enjoyed it. Considering it was generally a struggle to find vegetables and any meat other than jamón ibérico in Madrid (though no complaints about the latter), I found it refreshing to see vegetable-forward dishes and a heavy seafood influence. Some of the types of seafood were new to me as well, so I appreciated that element of adventure into the local cuisine.

Flavor-wise, it was heavy on salt, smoke, and cream. All extremely comforting and very much of Spanish essence. I think the overall journey of the courses spoke well, though someone’s comment about the salt-heavy diminuendo was noteworthy to me too - I guess the salt did serve as a bit of distraction on the palette so early on.

At first I would have agreed that the courses were not enough food-wise but I ended the night feeling very content. There were many protein-heavy dishes. The yema dish with the eel was a standout for me, as was the tenderness of the smoked pork, and a few others.

The only true downfall for me was that I had been hoping to see another land meat in the lineup - a quail would have been lovely, for example. A bit more balance btw land and sea would have made this a 5 star.

I’d come back again though. Thanks for a lovely dinner.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDVvcGCHya127QJ8g6ZDeUN&fid=0x0:0x73a1a17dd4d9d86e"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Andreea Andrei","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3I_58Mv6K_LcA9PbYPV2ZI3QG6pczj9u64SSRvlK1k6RNpBBa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This restaurant blew my boyfriends and I away. The restaurant itself was stunning and the service was impeccable. We absolutely loved it and would recommend coming back here again. Our favorite dish was the Iberian Wellington. We both thought it was beef instead of pork - that is how succulent the dish was.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBz9dQv051IrU1N9DN5GIT4&fid=0x0:0x73a1a17dd4d9d86e"],"When":"2025-10-27"},{"Name":"Ryan Clifford","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0RCSv3NE46npLc68KgmVW4uxEFQGCcJpZO1OEC_iMn3-_aw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our dining experience began here with my wife and I being greeted by Anya at the door.  She was very friendly and polite, taking my wife’s jacket and my bag at the door.

We were then waited on by Sergio, who was very friendly and professional.  My wife and I found him very pleasant to speak to throughout the courses, not too much, not too little.  Our water was consistently refilled without us even noticing, and each course was thoughtfully explained in clear English.

Then of course, there was the food.  It was clear to us that each dish was very thoughtfully put together to create the best experience possible.  The taste was out of this world, I cannot emphasize this enough.  The flavors were incredibly creative and original.

Further, despite my shellfish allergy, the chefs were able to fully accommodate without compromise.

To date, this has been the best restaurant I’ve ever been to.

I did not meet the head chef or the manager, but if either of you are reading this, you’re both doing an awesome job.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex Shih Mendez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpBTTVoiUhLEmxIMjId71uNy92B122So5Hvidehobt30tcIdSX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"As someone that was expecting something incredible, it was alright, I mean putting caviar and truffle on everything doesn’t mean it automatically tastes better. We had the tasting menu, I felt like there was something lacking… oh yes, flavor, that’s it. You can tell it’s just a place where the super rich go to tell others they’ve been to a “Michelin star”, but the ingredients were so simple, I was expecting something more complex, using rare Spanish ingredients. Also they fill you up with a big bread with butter and olive oil since the dishes are extremely tiny.

Other than that, service was good. I went for someone’s birthday, we had called earlier to confirm it was for a birthday and they completely forgot, only after we paid the check and reminded them, is when we got a little birthday surprise.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDAgY7hag&fid=0x0:0x73a1a17dd4d9d86e"],"When":"2025-2-9"},{"Name":"tweylin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0ACaC-m5479R-JbgUFu7SPFVs_Yd7Ge7EUKZzfIASdQjnPG6Xcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"restaurant is a little tucked away in the middle of a residential area. so best to get there by walking or Uber. food was excellent. I loved the beef and appetitiser. beef looked a bit raw but when slicing it, you realise it is cooked but yet still very tender and easy to cut. fish was also very fresh. desserts was OK with some chocolate pieces and ice cream with some accompanying gelatin. but I thought service was slightly inconsistent. dishes were not served to entire table at once and at times, some dietary restrictions were also slightly overlooked.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIzsffPA&fid=0x0:0x73a1a17dd4d9d86e"],"When":"2025-4-9"},{"Name":"R. S.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvkC0XYMQ7PN_1Rik9jzMmHQEPPcIgKS5PPc9kAFR9gnzXzNi7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A’Barra is a true fine dining gem in Madrid. Every dish was beautifully presented and full of flavor — the blue lobster ravioli and steak tartare were outstanding, and the Crêpe Suzette dessert was the perfect finish.
Excellent wine selection (the Finger Lakes Ravines was a great recommendation), and the service was professional and discreet.
Highly recommended for anyone looking for an elegant and memorable dining experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIkq-pswE&fid=0x0:0x73a1a17dd4d9d86e"],"When":"2025-4-8"},{"Name":"Digna Ten Napel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXizzX2AZpZ5btzGtIRg-Cz4VvunTq2tma0AGe8W6Nm8Of92LpI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing dishes and great staff! We had the tasting menu and all courses were delicious! Staff was very attentive and friendly. absolute recommendation for anyone who loves fine dining","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI1erZEw&fid=0x0:0x73a1a17dd4d9d86e"],"When":"2025-4-11"},{"Name":"Eduard Giménez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdA-dWwPXHpCwinvdn9Z49gFWG5vnenMOhmA7yUJDdh9Rd-x_f=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience. We had the tasting menu with the “Senaorial” wine pairing, and enjoyed it fully. Food was delicious, wines very interesting and helped to get the most out of each plate, and service was top-notch.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDnyb_DpwE&fid=0x0:0x73a1a17dd4d9d86e"],"When":"2024-10-7"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Daniel Farrow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0WkJKRxRlXu0V-f-Ul4t9lwMvSMYQKbDUY8DLC3jZoL-o3tA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It was a nice mall with a decent selection of shops.  The top floor was quite hot and uncomfortable, and the atmosphere was a bit run down.  I wasn't overly impressed with its glamor.

The parking was relatively useful if you have a small car.  I find it frustrating that they limit parking so much in general in Spain.  If you are in anything larger than an SUV, you can skip this stop.

The Dunkin was a nice touch though!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAQCCqTE2J5oQwULrvuyzrr&fid=0x0:0xdbc107e10df5fb01"],"When":"2025-7-18"},{"Name":"Tom Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKakUsBKh3lbWplL_C7crmzVx2wI2ZqDt3ZD0cjsuahDgMEJA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Be extremely cautious of the people around this area, you can’t tell who are good people who are bad people.  Most importantly, thieves and criminals are watching you, awaiting for you to be distracted or make mistakes.  We were robbed on the first day we arrived to Madrid, we rent a car and travel to this area in hope to find a bank to exchange money and grab a bite.  It was 12 noon and broad daylight, with my car parked along the street stepped about 30 feet to the money exchange place, with less than 15 minutes, they ransacked my car and took all my luggage, backpack, everything else they find in the car, thing like sunglasses and jacket.  They did so swiftly that I didn’t even noticed, as I get back to car and drive to my Airbnb, that’s when I opened my trunk and noticed all my luggage are gone.  My wife and i stranded without any personal belongings on the first day and feeling very distraught.  We have hear lots of tidbits about pickpockets and scammers but this experience show that there is more than that,  thieves and criminals must have on lookout at a constant pace, watching everyone in-n- out, arriving and leaving awaiting for us to make mistakes.  Granted, I forgot to lock my door, we were stepping away for only about 30 feet and still in broad daylight (noon time), but yet they managed to robbed us clean.  We are talking about 3 pieces of full size luggage and few other large item, we were in a busy /crowded area, I am sure many of the business establishments must have witnessed the whole thing unfolding and probably have seen this quite often.  After experiencing the bad ordeal on the first day of arrival, we were so disappointed of Spain, we booked a flight home.  I written all this just to let people know that, Madrid is not safe and you can find yourself in dire position if you don’t careful.  Thieves and criminals are watching you and awaiting to rob you whether it’s day or night.  We canceled the last leg of the trip to Barcelona and come home right after the experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Martínez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrjNTkGR-EcSgQdNmXWVQlp-P4RaZdlb2TD5ba47RXmT6wnziuog=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Pretty good for a city mall! Parking is good, there is a parking lot and a parking garage. They have all the major stores, H&M, Primark, all the Zara family of stores, C&A, Decathlon City, loads of places to eat on the top floor, a Mercadona to do your shopping and a movie theater. I am rating it a four because I feel that they don't keep the bathrooms up to snuff. The times that I've been there, I've found dirty stalls with unflushed toilets and no soap in the automatic dispensers. I understand it's the customers doing this, but they should have someone coming round once an hour or so to check this.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICF-dCpPg&fid=0x0:0xdbc107e10df5fb01"],"When":"2023-10-29"},{"Name":"Bubble Ha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBQ6OBgGqLdNppM4K6PJ759fYleuYvLD6B6cC-TB_G4MvIltwB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great experience shopping at this mall. Very clean, lots of space and good restroom facilities. Only thing I could not find was an information board or shops listing. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"perkash singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXu7dcywv_MNTpZCBxFUFb1gvAFECTC4kFSV3h0P_mvDjKCFOmk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I visited this shopping mall, and while it was large and looked nice, the experience was quite strange. There were multiple leaks from the ceiling, even inside some of the stores, which really lowered the overall standard. It’s hard to take a mall seriously when the roof isn’t even watertight.

On top of that, the escalator to the food court wasn’t working, so we had to leave the mall and enter again from another side — a pretty frustrating experience.

That said, we did find what we were looking for in the shops, so overall it was an okay visit, but definitely not impressive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_0vaaHFlBbYuLmtbGy3F5&fid=0x0:0xccee98581c84edbe"],"When":"2025-11-18"},{"Name":"Saeed Mekdachi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7RJZpf6joc02gEvFLUNwN31iMDXswJ6IRbKOZaKOC4Ao2eRQG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Mall contains everything you would need. Clean tidy and thoughtful selection of stores. Although it is a bit harder to get to and its not located in the centre of madrid more towards the north. I think tourists would be better off with other malls closer to the center. However there are stores here that you cannot find anywhere else such as Arabian Oud. Which is a big brand in the Middle East. However, main downside is that the design is simply not that impressive.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sam D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI3skPInRxBCF5fc1ParuvHp9-GCUUum79RnjlC-WVxROjTFA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This mall has everything you need. The service/staff are all amazing throughout, they are very helpful and do their best to assist. Primary has great deals and is a good place for souvenirs. AlCampo is one of my favorite markets, they have so much affordable food and drinks as well as snacks. The food selection was pretty great too with a mix of snacks, full meals and drink stations.
Overall great place to get some shopping done. It's clean and spacious. Could use some chair/benches in between stores.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"todoperfiles","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmpNBobdAf7GGj41qZtBt_aGBY95_TjSrZKBuRonG139lnUA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good options in clothing, food and entertainment!
Easy to reach with subway (only walk 1 block from the pilar station)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCI_ayXQw&fid=0x0:0xccee98581c84edbe"],"When":"2025-4-4"},{"Name":"BasicReviews","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUm35sAVzX2zZyFrASlJrXPsSi8kGFv4Qx_OGrBZHL2J2GI-HxlQA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice place with lots of stores and good places to eat. In the heart of Madrid.

The only bummer about this mall is that it’s seriously lacking spots to plop down—no benches, no cozy armchairs, no chairs… (outside of the restaurants, cafés, and such). 😎","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDER0c-W9dha-w8XFW0Zx2Q&fid=0x0:0xccee98581c84edbe"],"When":"2025-7-7"},{"Name":"I'Anja Prisca Raveloalijaona","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmqOKiQ-JfaIsEnyEkuWuMQdY97dpgm7SY92Zhcf7sWRze7Kbo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"You can find just about everything here! I often go to do my shopping, but also just to walk around or spend some time. The place is well-organized, pleasant, and offers a great variety of stores, restaurants, and services.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gina Mae Nuñez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrxoMTSrpBaUZgEbr59tuVcbbhROs62oJ462YhshEH2Iuw47w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Clean and wide shopping center. They almost have everything you need to look for for the affordable prices from apparels , electronics, groceries, cinema for your bored time and others. This is near to Bario del Pilar Metro station (Line9) and there are buses too. Include this in your list to visit with your friends/family.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJ15SsGA&fid=0x0:0xccee98581c84edbe"],"When":"2023-7-6"},{"Name":"Hone Sa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLiBgaV_MGnrWtM9Kkb1W8gcdjmyNVhgcUSJnqj5W9ka97YyUk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Quiet small shopping center.

📍Not open on some holidays!! (Even though the Google map might say otherwise !!)

Some shops close at 9 and some at 10.
The food court is open until 12 but better to get there before 11 as some restaurants close around 11 or 11:30

It has Primor, Mango, Zara, Alcampo,…","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_u_H2nQE&fid=0x0:0xccee98581c84edbe"],"When":"2025-1-19"}]

You can also see a sports and kids section on its -1 floor","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sonia Pereira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZGuPeBTepbieTkIKM1iWSOl14_dTxtRZiyOLSPDu-mEfBOf2F=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great findings. Designer clothes at affordable prices. But if you're looking fir something very specific, you may get disappointed. Some items only available in a few sizes.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alvester Garnett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0Qkn0ztwB08BX27y2Mv1jr8tc0WeiI6Lkrh8c1zhUtIMby-M4Tg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I accompanied my wife shopping here & found there to be a decent selection of options, at least as it applies to women's attire. The store was neat and fairly tidy. You can tell they place the kids' toys for maximum last minute purchase appeal though as they are right around the checkout counter where a lot of women costumers might use to pay for their purchases. If they have kids with them at that counter it's definitely something the kids are going to notice. On the surface it's an odd placement to have toys in the women's attire section but as business move it's rather cunning.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVopGt-HwCTTf4kqb_npjRm5f5HZwyrX1Xlv406eQvq1zBZ0p9W=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is not for this store in particular, it's for online orders. The last order I made has been an absolute joke. I got a pair of shoes and dress delivered to me in the wrong size, so I asked to have them changed just so that they could bring me the wrong sizes again on both articles! I am now having to ask for the size to be replaced on the dress, that I've been waiting weeks to finally receive and decided to give back the shoes because I am exhausted of going back and forth with these people. They barely apologised or cared about repeating the same mistakes over and over again. Apparently anyone who complains to this corporatocracy with terrible management skills is dubbed a rebel without a clue and blacklisted. It seems they have a problem with receiving constructive criticism and learning from their mistakes.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maja Kolarov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKStAHNf7WI0cw1aoByzVn-1bTgrfHzOzEAnRbY1sA_oDDuCR8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It is really big department store, they have very big selection of the shops, brands, products... They are not very good organized, at least not on the ground floor. It looks quite messy. I was searching for Mont Blanc brand almost half an hour. When I asked on the information they told me it doesn't exist. I finally found it, I couldn't believe that people who work at information desk are so unprofessional.
Also some prices that I was checking were higher than on the other places.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ρόε Μον","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUWbTaAccg-YkOW9ZWNMbZxn5FcdcOdJtqgU57yGcV7WZjCP5c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Our first stop was to go to el Cortes for pet food and light groceries for our hotel suite to stock the refrigerator. Great place to shop and fairly reasonable prices. Excellent clothes shopping. The cafeteria is very good especially for something light.
Headquartered in Madrid, it is the biggest department store group in Europe and ranks fourth worldwide. El Corte Inglés is Spain's only remaining department store chain.
This is a place we stop on in every visit. It has a very comfortable feel. I purchased a few suits and our salesperson Antonio saw that alterations   were finished by the next day.","Images":null,"When":""}]

But when it's quiet and you barely got traffic I expect that it's an easier experience for both me as a shopper and the seller, not the other way around.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICN6b2MiQE&fid=0x0:0x9a8acc2d9605161"],"When":"2024-1-15"},{"Name":"Prachi N.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvhgn4VrLw5FA1YRq-JDlZ-gEUzX51vzSKlT51_IfjqgbT3Y1lgA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One stop shop with all brands under a single roof. title: CALEIDO Madrid

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"PL Lau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_kjCx3N7Oe5EIg03qgHTSqYbHJ9Dr8h6_hZbfJqZYWeYejkv9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"⭐⭐⭐⭐ A Modern Architectural Landmark with Great Vibes!

Caleido is a spectacular addition to the northern part of Paseo de la Castellana. It’s much more than just a business tower—it’s a unique hybrid of a shopping center, park, and food court that has become a favorite spot for my family.

Architecture & Atmosphere
The modern architecture is truly impressive. It’s a very pleasant place to walk around any day of the week. The layout is open and airy, making it a perfect spot to enjoy the outdoors while still being in a commercial hub. I often bring my daughter here in the afternoons to skate, and it feels safe and spacious.

Dining & Terraces
The restaurant area is beautiful and definitely the highlight for me. There is a fantastic variety of places to find something to eat or drink. The terraces are wonderful for relaxing and enjoying the "luxury" vibe of the surroundings. Whether you're looking for a quick bite or a sit-down dinner, the food court area is top-notch.

Shopping Note
While the environment is great, the shopping side is a bit different. The stores are definitely on the expensive/luxury side and, as a result, often seem quite empty. While it fits the aesthetic of the business district, it doesn’t always feel like the most practical or profitable shopping destination for everyone.

Final Verdict
Despite the high-end prices in the shops, Caleido is a must-visit for the experience alone. It’s a great place to shop, eat, and hang out with family in a stunning modern setting. If you’re in the area, it’s well worth stopping by just to appreciate the building and the great selection of restaurants!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC36XKbcT45X9ssc-fD7ast&fid=0x0:0xa8c1d0fb23902328"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"ARCH. title: Quevedo
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"snarkyguy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpLEkMbqQ117vEXR5NomvRhhZgkwVvVtKfHyjAnrI4JKwbnhs2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was my "home" metro station while I stayed in Madrid. It's well-located, easy to find, and surprisingly clean compared to many metro stations I've had the pleasure of using around the world. It's well-lit at night, open late, and the stairs are not to steep for my wife. Bonus! Honestly my favorite way for commuting around Madrid. Keep in mind there are no elevators or escalators going down, only stairs.

There's a lot of card options, but I think the best choice is the 10-trip card. It's good for buses and metro. I'd scan through the turnstile and then had the card to my wife and she'd do the same.

2-trips used. Simple.

Leaving the metro is even easier as you DON'T SCAN to leave. Just...leave! Be careful of the platform as there are no rails to keep you from falling off the tracks. Just stay on your side of the yellow line. When the train arrives, push the glowing button on the metro car to open the door.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDtuZztiAE&fid=0x0:0x28873dc15ecbd999"],"When":"2024-2-5"},{"Name":"tuyen nq","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLaaWKWiLPWApiW6pFNFszQFEk4ZU9ujo3S6VIBGpvGi2naEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Convenient","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"J. A few stories tall, maybe 5 or 6 floors I  didn't count,  this mall has everything you need to stay shopping or just window shopping for at least a couple of hours.
Nice layout, popular stores, a food court, restaurants, parking garage, and playground for the kids. The nice formal restaurants are located in the top floor.
This Mall is right across a small bridge from "Matadero Madrid" a very popular Art Center of which i had written a review too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDmmMPn6gE&fid=0x0:0xf00a1384ed1877c7"],"When":"2022-1-18"},{"Name":"Liam Stivala","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLzaaA4Fn13wElzxP4EAyOFQ1_vBpJAsvTIENRnV3dBFLX7PQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We ate dinner at wanderlust within the mall and were very happy with the food and service. [{"Name":"Ctgb2","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItC9iDa9r9g_651odkZll6vFcFOS4APKRO34THBDIzmKIUQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I stopped by Alcalá Norte mostly by accident while exploring a more residential side of Madrid, and it felt very different from the big flashy malls near the center.

This place is clearly built for locals. Not luxurious, not trendy — just practical. You’ve got supermarkets, everyday clothing stores, small electronics shops, and a simple food court. The kind of mall people actually use for errands rather than spending an entire afternoon shopping.

The atmosphere is calm and normal. Families doing groceries, teenagers hanging out after school, older couples sitting with coffee. It feels real compared to tourist-heavy areas.

Food options were basic but affordable, which was honestly refreshing after city-center prices. Nothing gourmet, but easy and convenient.

It’s not somewhere you travel across Madrid to visit — but if you’re nearby and want to see everyday life instead of attractions, it works perfectly.

Overall:
Not exciting, but authentic. A neighborhood mall rather than a destination, and that’s exactly its charm.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jason Davies","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdSTIM222cwStEOhRt2EALfmVqUWOwP149WtsB61NuZ00xoLIwUA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The cinema is good value but the shopping center is very strange.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Urban Traveler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZY0HoHOb7lzycQDWjKey0rY0ABGKAZdibLczqX3_UWre4TRE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Pathetic. Es amplia, y suele estar muy concurrida.

En el centro de la glorieta hay una estatua de gran tamaño en homenaje al gran escritor que le da nombre, obra de Agustín Querol. La zona está llena de restaurantes y comercios de todo tipo. Recomendable si pararte a verla si pasas por Chamberí.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC3x5vbUA&fid=0x0:0x7e2ec2610bfa189d"],"When":"2024-11-9"},{"Name":"Jaime San Cayetano Amor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAGMdOplnBg4XXRNgPnCo8wTqMCslaNtROtn_nS6DXztMGKqv2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Rotonda dedicada al gran escritor español que culmina el inicio de la calle Fuencarral. Además, la glorieta está decorada con cuatro árboles con leds azules por navidad.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICB5Im7Iw&fid=0x0:0x7e2ec2610bfa189d"],"When":"2022-12-17"},{"Name":"Salvator Mundi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWl3Y3brUOzzqe3dORyucP80GI88NIqEWYGdpx9_dHNvvi0kc5K=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Die Glorieta de Quevedo, dieser kleine Kreisverkehr im Herzen von Madrid, ist ein Ort, der gleichermaßen Geschichte, Alltagshektik und eine Prise Chaos in sich vereint.
Als ich mich ihr nähere, wird schnell klar, dass sie nicht mit majestätischen Statuen oder opulenten Brunnen prahlt.
Nein, die Glorieta de Quevedo ist eine echte Diva: unaufgeregt, ein wenig exzentrisch, und immer mitten im Geschehen.

In ihrer Mitte steht eine Statue von Francisco de Quevedo, dem berühmten Dichter und Satiriker des spanischen Siglo de Oro. Und wie könnte es anders sein – Quevedo, bekannt für seine scharfe Zunge und seinen beißenden Humor, steht da mit einem Blick, der zu sagen scheint: „So viele Autos, und keiner hat Zeit für ein gutes Sonett?“ Er hält eine Feder in der einen und ein Buch in der anderen Hand, als wolle er jedem vorbeieilenden Pendler einen Vers nachwerfen.
Doch die meisten beachten ihn kaum, zu sehr beschäftigt mit ihrem Tag – oder dem Versuch, diesen vertrackten Verkehrsknotenpunkt heil zu überstehen.

Die Glorieta selbst ist ein Wirbel aus städtischem Leben. Autos kreisen um sie herum wie auf einem Karussell, Motorräder schlängeln sich geschickt durch die engen Lücken, und Fußgänger kämpfen tapfer, um die Straße zu überqueren.
Die Ampeln hier haben offenbar ihren eigenen Zeitplan, der selten mit dem der Fußgänger übereinstimmt.
Es fühlt sich ein bisschen an wie ein Tanz, nur dass niemand den Takt kennt.

Rund um die Glorieta reihen sich Bars, Cafés und Geschäfte aneinander, die ihre ganz eigene Geschichte erzählen. Eine charmante Mischung aus hippen Lokalen und traditionellen Läden prägt das Viertel.
Es gibt eine Bäckerei, die so duftet, dass man fast vergisst, warum man hier überhaupt hergekommen ist, und ein paar kleine Buchläden, die vermutlich mehr Geschichten über Quevedo verkaufen, als er je selbst geschrieben hat.

Doch zurück zu unserem Dichter in der Mitte: Quevedo hat diesen Platz nicht immer für sich gehabt.
Die Glorieta wurde im 19. Jahrhundert angelegt, und wie so viele Orte in Madrid hat sie sich im Laufe der Zeit verändert.
Früher war sie ruhiger, weniger verkehrsreich – ein Ort, an dem sich Spaziergänger in Ruhe ihre Gedanken sammeln konnten.
Heute dagegen scheint es, als ob Quevedo selbst kaum mit dem Kopf aus seinen Papieren hochkommen würde, um das Durcheinander um ihn herum zu registrieren.

Trotzdem hat die Glorieta de Quevedo einen unbestreitbaren Charme. Sie ist lebendig, eigenwillig und ein bisschen chaotisch – genau wie die Stadt, in der sie sich befindet.
Während ich dort stehe und das bunte Treiben beobachte, stelle ich mir vor, wie Quevedo seine spitze Feder in die Hand nimmt und über diesen Ort schreiben würde. Wahrscheinlich wäre es eine bissige Satire über die Absurditäten des modernen Lebens.
Oder vielleicht würde er einfach schmunzeln, einen Schluck Wein aus einer nahen Taverne nehmen und denken: „Madrid bleibt Madrid – immer ein wenig verrückt, aber dafür umso liebenswerter.“

Stand: 17.11.2024

"Das Leben bewegt sich sehr, sehr schnell. Wenn man nicht gelegentlich anhält und sich umschaut, könnte man es verpassen"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juan Zuñiga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWn3T98VZZ4vRWHU9ba8rgrEqZIU15U3Ri5euEnnSngdJ1ecbI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Chamberí es un distrito de Madrid formado por seis barrios: Almagro, Trafalgar, Arapiles, Gaztambide, Ríos Rosas y Vallehermoso. Su desarrollo urbanístico es fruto del Plan de Ensanche de Carlos María de Castro aprobado en 1860 cuando desapareció la Real Cerca de Felipe IV y ejecutado en las décadas siguientes hasta la consolidación de los años treinta del siglo pasado y las reconstrucciones tras la Guerra Civil. Aquí se encuentran los palacios y palacetes mas bellos de la ciudad –los supervivientes a la piqueta de los años 50, 60 y 70– y aquí vivieron personalidades como Benito Pérez Galdós, José Ortega y Gasset, Gregorio Marañón, Rubén Darío, Antonio Machado, Pablo Neruda, Gerardo Diego, Ramón Pérez de Ayala, Agustín Querol, Joaquín Sorolla, Mariano Benlliure y Miguel de Unamuno. Hoy pasearemos entre las esculturas públicas que se exhiben en este distrito.

La más importante es, quizás, la dedicada a Francisco de Quevedo en la glorieta con su nombre, obra de Agustín Querol (1860-1909), uno de los encargos promovidos por el alcalde Alberto Aguilera en 1902 como parte del programa escultórico conmemorativo de la mayoría de edad de Alfonso XIII. La escultura es bellísima pero el flujo de tráfico rodado apenas permite apreciarla. Tal vez habría que sustituirla por una réplica y llevar a un museo la original.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICbvt_MmQE&fid=0x0:0x7e2ec2610bfa189d"],"When":"2024-7-27"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jhon Kensington","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZU1YBDENQnvtQt2VLmO7r20vZwz3n5xYys4noMhqedoHQ_Ak=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cinesa Proyecciones offers a fantastic cinema experience in the Cham berí neighbourhood. I've visited several times and each visit has been thoroughly enjoyable. The screens are large with crystal-clear picture quality, and the sound system is superb. The seating is comfortable with ample legroom, which is particularly appreciated during longer films. The staff are professional and courteous, always willing to help with any queries. The location on Calle de Fuencarral makes it extremely accessible by public transport. They show a good variety of films, from mainstream blockbusters to original language versions. The booking system online is straightforward, and the prices are reasonable for central Madrid. Overall, it's a brilliant choice for a cinema outing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ara'","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsCVLjq994slV5EvKNWDJIa9i_woW7_9f4VMEPML8lwO7ORiUB8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It is a very good cinema. Quite fast to get the tickets, the staff is very professional and you can get popcorn and other kind of food before the movie. The screen was very big and Dolby surround audio is of great quality. The VIP seats are the best. Worth a visit!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDksPP7IQ&fid=0x0:0x4e49b8e6a07e789d"],"When":"2018-3-10"},{"Name":"Mo Li","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXEZC0vksuIDK_fe3ItNy-SXd3QDkqMuYyN3LgcJ4VfL-6gJM92=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The cleaning staff made everyone stand on the side BEFORE the movie rowing credits finishes.
The lady's bathroom is extremely small, not possible to sit down! I am 45kg but I can't fit myself in there.
The location is good. There are so much potential, yet they are not able to do a proper job.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4ooKsAw&fid=0x0:0x4e49b8e6a07e789d"],"When":"2017-6-10"},{"Name":"Raymundo José Ramirez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMH43ylZq_q_LZlzBQIyCmyMYOMC1eZN5dVc_rEHhRo1RMveM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wednesday’s tickets are for 9€ which was great. Big screens and a nice vibe. It reminds me of a classic movie theater. It's close to the Bilbao metro station.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Diego Prosperi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKzRnBmGfc_4JSAmggywDt6WVESzb21CR6_0MM2SqIrj3rABg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This cinema is totally overpriced. No wonder people don't go to the cinema as much with these prices. Better to check out other movie theatres in the city as they offer the same thing at much more competitive prices. The prices they charge are not justified at all. I definitely won't go back here.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Miguel Nieto Fernández","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhdjsURk9V6JdbB-tJXPb6XQm3Q90Dxq7DqgdjlefnRu8fCLuT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The rows are very steep so you can watch the screen freely without the one in front blocking you.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lars Heidemann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJjV2VRk3qrE3eTyZuCeF7jsE2gAGPL04Yal0OvHpU1YxS1lQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredibly incredibly friendly and beyond helpful staff at this cinema.

La seguridad del centro comercial no se hace responsable, solo te dicen que pongas una denuncia de la policía. ¿Para qué sirve la seguridad y tanta cámara? Una vergüenza","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"celia guisado arnillas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKYhBq5Izqtv_pzgR2OQ4_YdbIDQZqEs2jfldVnSpbbtADSUw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Me gusta, porque tiene la farmacia y Ahorramás, pero es completamente imposible aparcar vayas a la hora que vayas….voy a tener que dejar de ir…","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"yves schmidt-beyer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLEu_XM-btJWeSdEvmUQGtBw6YUEFnVxHSuajoAEv4ZS1u3aw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El centro comercial en sí no está mal.   Pero el tema del parking es horrible ! Todo el barrio lo usa para aparcar como si fuera su propio garaje.   Los coches allí metidos por días . Si tienes un coche eléctrico , olvídate de cargarlo.   La gente dejan sus coches allí todo el día cargando

No entiendo como no lo pueden arreglar de la manera más fácil : poner barreras como en cualquier centro comercial , dar dos horas gratis y así lo usarán la gente que van allí a hacer compras y no estará abusado como el parking del barrio","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sergi Kalakatl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8s-hwHAX7KmmUMoq-exsKX46B-5iwfe4kQo-_PtzzzPPS8GOt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Nun, es ist merkwürdig, dass die Leute an einen nationalen Supermarkt namens Ahorramás denken, aber in Wirklichkeit handelt es sich um eine spanische Franchise des deutschen Supermarkts Netto, der diese Galerie mit drei weiteren deutschen Läden bewohnt: Tedi, Aldi und Midas. Eine weitere merkwürdige Sache, die kein Zufall ist, ist, dass direkt hinter den Türen der Mall, gleich auf der anderen Straßenseite, ein riesiges deutsches Schulgebäude steht. Also, Es gibt keine Informationen über die TEDi- und Midas-Läden im Keller der besagten Galerie. Bis die Informationen vollständig sind, gebe ich einen einzigen Stern, vielen Dank","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDzlMmYaA&fid=0x0:0x132de719ac647996"],"When":"2024-6-7"},{"Name":"Maria Teresa Prada Blanco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXr9RGrwFo4fgDZqfFGpIOOL74oausbzvLHV27hP1PS8bOmNsxydA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Es una vergüenza lo que hacen los empleados del taller midas . Se pasan dando vueltas y bloqueando todos los espacios de los usuarios de la plaza que se van . Parece que se dedican más a bloquear plazas que a reparar coches . No conformes con tener bloqueadas todas las que se encuentran en su lado . No.me extraña que tuviera que cerrar la juguetera.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Or should I say LOWE! ^^ thank you Marina","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paul Gu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIwxfWD_ufiKmGpCIbW9Ikg58vuZpSGDiRl6CjBoZcA65h8rcE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If you are here for a tax free refund, go upstairs to the 3rd floor. If you see people sitting and standing, waiting for their turns, get your tax free waiting ticket (starts with X) and be prepared to spend at least an hour. Even with all counters fully staffed, they only take those with A and E tickets. I have been here for over 30 minutes and not a single X ticket has been called. I went up and asked and all I heard was, “oh, the wait for all is like 30min..” Sure. The person behind me who got an A ticket already left with his thing figured out.

I think anti-tourist strategy really discourages tourists in time crunch from getting their tax refunded.

All tax refund processes I had with El corte ingles used to be all smooth. Now no more. I will buy stuff from outside if possible. GO ELSEWHERE TO BUY IF YOU CAN.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ralph Brown","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWw2tWFW1UEpc35BG2fwW9q2Eeq8tOZ5T-0P4idCwpZfzTSId2dhA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This shopping store was right a cross the street from my hotel, its like a small mall and a fantastic grocery store in one. Many selections both for food, and shopping.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhABo_QOuzmJ7lb_FFk_xx0-\u0026fid=0x0:0xcbf9370ac84ce0db"],"When":"2025-6-4"},{"Name":"Michelle Martínez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrjNTkGR-EcSgQdNmXWVQlp-P4RaZdlb2TD5ba47RXmT6wnziuog=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best mall in Madrid, loads of stores, all the ones you'd want and more. The parking lot is enormous and there is underground parking as well. Everything is organized really well.  Jewelry in one area, treatments and hair salon in another, all eye centers together. Lots of bathrooms and sitting areas. At one time it was the biggest mall, probably not anymore, but as I said, definitely the best offer and services.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIClg4vongE\u0026fid=0x0:0xcbf9370ac84ce0db"],"When":"2023-11-25"},{"Name":"Raquel Raizman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVxro5eBonBgOIdscHZF2kKy9lMQRyCi4SzpSzTR3S1iF5v2avuLA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La Gavia Mall is a fantastic place to shop, dine, and spend the day. This El Corte Inglés is a massive department store where each floor is dedicated to a different category, making it organized and fun to explore. The top floor is a major highlight, featuring an extensive food court with diverse options. We had a wonderful time and have nothing negative to report.
